🌧️ COIN RAIN EVENT LIVE
Coins + confetti rain on ALL screens. Everyone gets the coins.
🌊 TSUNAMI ALL PLAYERS
🎉 CELEBRATION ALL PLAYERS
☄️ METEOR SHOWER ALL PLAYERS
💀 BLACKOUT ALL PLAYERS
⚡ LIGHTNING STORM ALL PLAYERS
Screen strobes, lightning bolts crash down.
🌀 VOID RIFT ALL PLAYERS
Reality tears open with a purple dimensional crack.
🔄 GRAVITY FLIP ALL PLAYERS
Entire screen flips 180° then snaps back.
🪩 DISCO FEVER ALL PLAYERS
Wild colour flashes + music note rain.
💛 GOLDEN FEVER ALL PLAYERS
Screen goes gold, coin shower erupts.
💥 SHOCKWAVE ALL PLAYERS
Ripple explosion from centre + screen shake.
⏱ TIME WARP ALL PLAYERS
Screen goes greyscale with hue-shift glitch.
🌈 NEON BLAST ALL PLAYERS
24 neon rays explode from screen centre.
☀️ SOLAR FLARE ALL PLAYERS
Blinding white-to-orange plasma flash.
🩸 BLOOD MOON ALL PLAYERS
Screen dims red, blood moon rises, drips fall.
💥 CHAOS EVENT 4 RANDOM EVENTS
Fires 4 random events simultaneously. Coins split between them.
🪙 COIN RUSH EVENT ALL PLAYERS
Popup appears on all screens. Players who accept enter a special level with 150 coins scattered. They keep whatever they collect — but 1 death = game over, no retry.
🔨 BAN PLAYER LIVE
⚡ GLOBAL POWERS LIVE — ALL PLAYERS
Activates for every online player simultaneously.
⚡ SELF POWERS 60 SECONDS EACH
🎁 GIVE SKIN TO ALL ONLINE LIVE
🎁 GIVE SKIN TO PLAYER LIVE
👑 GIVE ADMIN ACCESS LIVE
Player will see the admin button on next login check.
🚫 REVOKE ALL ADMINS INSTANT + OFFLINE
Instantly removes admin from EVERY player except PREDATORS455.
Works even if they are offline — their button disappears on next load.
⚠ EMERGENCY COIN RESET LIVE — ALL PLAYERS
Triggers a 10-second countdown on ALL screens. Resets every player's coins to 0. PREDATORS455 is immune. Use only in emergencies.
